title: Controlling High Blood Pressure
description: Percentage of patients 18-85 years of age with a diagnosis of essential hypertension whose most recent blood pressure was adequately controlled (<140/<90 mmHg).

title: Diabetes: Hemoglobin A1c Poor Control (>9%)
description: Percentage of patients 18-75 years of age with diabetes who had hemoglobin A1c > 9.0% during the measurement period.

title: Severe Obstetric Complications
description: Hospital measure of severe obstetric complications occurring during inpatient delivery encounters.

title: Controlling High Blood Pressure (FHIR)
description: Percentage of patients 18-85 years of age with essential hypertension whose most recent blood pressure was adequately controlled (<140/90 mmHg) during the measurement period. 2026 FHIR/QI-Core eCQM.

title: Diabetes: Glycemic Status Assessment Greater Than 9% (FHIR)
description: Percentage of patients 18-75 years of age with diabetes whose most recent glycemic status assessment (HbA1c or glucose management indicator) was >9.0% or missing during the measurement period. 2026 FHIR/QI-Core eCQM (formerly CMS122v11).

title: Severe Obstetric Complications (FHIR)
description: Inpatient delivery hospitalizations with severe obstetric complications. 2026 FHIR/QI-Core episode-of-care eCQM with two rate groups (formerly ePC-02).
